Cackling Bones  

Description

1: Summon Skeleton Pet: PCPetNecS09L044Skel2

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 450 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 15 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 5 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso animates an undead servant.

Game Description

Animates an undead servant from the remnants of the fallen. Consumes bone chips when cast.

Reagents

  • Bone Chips x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Cackling Bones
  • Spell: Cackling Bones [Researched]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Cackling Bones
Spell: Cackling Bones
ClassLevel
SHD58
NEC44
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (22)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (8)
  • Scroll 2 Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
  • Spell: Cackling Bones - Research 110

All you need to know about our pets
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2005 at 10:30 AM Rating: Default
vorpalswd
132 posts
▲ Page top
RE: All you need to know about pets (except this)
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2006 at 11:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591863387220
83 posts
Heya guys.
Found out something useful that i have to share with yÃ¡ll.
Unless you have purchased the AA to allow you to store your pet when you camp you lose the pet right? Wrong!
With the introduction of shrouds it is now possible to turn into a shroud (any shroud) before you camp, and when you log on next and unshroud. BAM same pet with same pet kits =) =)
Hope this brings more fun to you all.
▲ Page top
RE: All you need to know about pets (except this)
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2006 at 7:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342867392
View User Forum
Scholar
34 posts
Nice discovery! Tried it and it works! As long as your pet doesn't die, you preserve all of your pet toys too! Thank you very much :)
▲ Page top
RE: All you need to know about pets (except this)

duel
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2004 at 8:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591809246017
20 posts
i dueled my dads 51 necro and his pet was life taping me for 45 but i dont know if that is full because i have high resist
▲ Page top
Pet not using weapon
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 7:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255893394
12 posts
The reason the pet will not use the weapon is that it will go for the fastest delay possible instead of the proc. Thus it using no weapons it hits faster than with the axe. It doesnt take into account the procs at all. That is why if you try to give a higher level pet a FS 2h or another slow 2h weapon it ignores your request to use it and simply beats things with its bare knuckles.
▲ Page top
RE: Pet not using weapon
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2005 at 2:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362490706
6 posts
all pets after like 29 have DW they will not use any kind of 2hander you can give them any 1hander tho but they follow the rules if the 2 weapons you give them are primary only then best one is used proc doesnt matter to pet if weapon can be put in secondary also then he will wield them both monk pet at 56 is last pet you see that will weild either 1handers or 2handers with a weighted axe i have seen 56 monk pet hit for 105 was kinda cool to see when i was at that lvl
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

__DEL__1591808271681

Pet Weps
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 11:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785131935
5 posts
After getting to 44 and using the pet for the first time i noticed a change in the weps the pet will hold. When I used my lvl 39 pet I would give it the Axe of Frost and it would hit for 45 and proc often. The 44 pet will not hold this wep. Anyone know why it will not. The Axe of Frost I have found is a good, cheap, and easy to get wep for pet. Any info would be good on this.

Iksancer
LvL 45 Iksar Necro

http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=544143
▲ Page top
RE: Pet Weps
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2003 at 2:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759969079
51 posts
Probably because this pet in particular can lifetap compared to the lesser pets..so they wont have 2 kinds of proc's maybe? Who knows
